title: 48 Pcs 75mm Sanding Sponge Set 80-3000 Grit Sanding Pads, Flexible Sandpaper Block Coarse and Fine, Foam Sanding Pads Washable and Reusable, Wet and Dry Sandpaper for Metal Wood Wall Polishing
features: Assortment Pack: Unsure which grit to start with? This kit has you covered. This set includes 48 sanding sponges with grits ranging from 80 (for coarse material removal) to 3000 (for ultra-fine polishing), with 4 pieces of each: 80, 120, 180, 240, 320, 400, 500-600, 800-1000, 1200-1500, 2000, 2500, and 3000. Grit sizes are clearly labelled on the back of the abrasive pads

Durable & Comfortable Design: Made with a soft sponge buffering layer, these sanding blocks absorb vibrations, reduce hand fatigue, and provide a secure grip. The high-quality abrasive material ensures long-lasting use without tearing

Wet & Dry Use: Designed for both wet sanding paper (reduces dust, extends lifespan) and dry sanding (quick material removal). Perfect for automotive refinishing, wood furniture refinishing, and DIY projects

Wide Professional & DIY Applications: Whether you're polishing drywall, smoothing wood furniture, or prepping metal/auto surfaces, these sanding sponges are essential for craftsmen, carpenters, and home renovators

Hook and Loop Design: The hook and loop connection design of the sanding sponge allows them to be easily and firmly attached to most 3 inch Tools. The secure-grip design keeps abrasives firmly in place during use while allowing effortless switching between grits
description: All-in-One Sanding Sponge Assortment Pack This comprehensive 48-piece sanding sponge set is your ultimate solution for any sanding task. It includes 12 different grits—from coarse 80 grit for aggressive material removal to ultra-fine 3000 grit for flawless polishing. With 4 pieces of each grit (80, 120, 180, 240, 320, 400, 500-600, 800-1000, 1200-1500, 2000, 2500, 3000), this kit is perfect for refinishing wood furniture, performing auto bodywork, and preparing delicate surfaces. Durable & Comfortable to Use Crafted with a soft sponge buffering layer, these sanding blocks absorb vibration and provide a secure, comfortable grip. This ergonomic design significantly reduces hand fatigue during extended use, while the high-quality abrasive material is built to last without tearing or breaking down. Versatile Wet and Dry Use Engineered for maximum versatility, these sponges excel in both wet and dry sanding applications. Dry sanding allows for quick material removal, while wet sanding minimizes dust and extends the life of the abrasive. This makes them ideal for automotive painting, woodworking, and a wide range of DIY projects. Broad Professional & DIY Applications A must-have for craftsmen and hobbyists alike, these sponges are essential for smoothing drywall, shaping wood, and prepping metal or automotive surfaces. Whatever your project, this kit provides the right tool for a flawless finish. Convenient Hook and Loop Design Featuring a universal hook and loop backing, these sanding sponges attach easily and securely to most standard 3-inch sanding tools. This secure-grip design ensures the abrasive stays firmly in place during use while allowing for quick and effortless grit changes.
